eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Jay, IN; at 12:02 PM on JUL 3, 2019 Effective until 12:32 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
This is a test of the NIXLE alert system.  If this would have been an actual alert information would follow.  

Information such was what is occurring and what action should be taken would be attached.

This is only a test. No action needs to be taken at this time, It is only a test.
